  5. Dice Roller Online — D6 D20 & More

Dice Roller Online — D6 D20 & More

Roll any combination of dice with a single click. The D6 renders as a realistic 3D cube that tumbles and lands on the correct face. All other dice types animate with a spin. Add up to 10 of each die type and roll them all at once.

Add dice to your roll

D61

Jak używać

  1. 1

    Click a die button (D4, D6, D8 …) to add it to your roll.

  2. 2

    Use the + and − buttons to set how many of each die to roll (up to 10).

  3. 3

    Click the Roll button — watch the dice animate and land on their results.

  4. 4

    The total across all dice is shown below the results.

Często zadawane pytania
